channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17601] sanity: 413a Failed with 'subdirs shouldn't be evenly distributed: 21 - 19 <= 2'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Arshad <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/7f7b51c1-9580-46b0-8dbd-877489028644

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/102704 - 4.18.0-477.27.1.el8_8.aarch64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/102704 - 4.18.0-477.27.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

 

...
Mkdir (stripe_count 3) with balanced space usage:
CMD: onyx-120vm10,onyx-120vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param lod.*.mdt_qos_threshold_rr=0
CMD: onyx-120vm10,onyx-120vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param lod.*.mdt_qos_prio_free=100
CMD: onyx-120vm10,onyx-120vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param lod.*.mdt_qos_maxage=1
19 directories created on MDT0 : curmax=19
20 directories created on MDT1 : curmax=20
20 directories created on MDT2 : curmax=20
21 directories created on MDT3 : curmax=21
sanity test_413a: @@@@@@ FAIL: subdirs shouldn't be evenly distributed: 21 - 19 <= 2 
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6947:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:28854:test_qos_mkdir()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:28923:test_413a()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7287:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7347:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7173:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:28926:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2024-03-01/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-dne-arm_102704_32_14ff0ebe-ba25-46fe-bf7f-97b5a9a592ff//sanity.test_413a.*.1709306896.log
CMD: onyx-120vm10,onyx-120vm4,onyx-120vm9,onyx-91vm25.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-91vm26 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-03-01/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-dne-arm_102704_32_14ff0ebe-ba25-46fe-bf7f-97b5a9a592ff//sanity.test_413a.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1709306896.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-03-01/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-dne-arm_102704_32_14ff0ebe-ba25-46fe-bf7f-97b5a9a592ff//sanity.test_413a.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1709306896.log

unlinked 0 (time 1709306899 ; total 0 ; last 0)
total: 80 unlinks in 3 seconds: 26.666666 unlinks/second unlinked 0 (time 1709306902 ; total 0 ; last 0)
total: 80 unlinks in 2 seconds: 40.000000 unlinks/second
CMD: onyx-120vm10,onyx-120vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param lod.*.mdt_qos_threshold_rr=0
CMD: onyx-120vm10,onyx-120vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param lod.*.mdt_qos_prio_free=100
CMD: onyx-120vm9 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n debug
CMD: onyx-120vm10,onyx-120vm4,onyx-120vm9,onyx-91vm25.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-91vm26 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n debug=0 unlinked 0 (time 1709306906 ; total 0 ; last 0)
total: 120 unlinks in 2 seconds: 60.000000 unlinks/second 
...
  •  

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>
item.summary: sanity: 413a Failed with 'subdirs shouldn't be evenly distributed: 21 - 19 <= 2'

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment: +1 on master branch: https://testing.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/9ad3fa58-5b2a-4cf9-ad16-791aa856f478

+1 on Master : https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/3a6c46e5-a7ca-47ed-923f-f2d44373f4e6

Client: Kernel version    4.18.0-553.71.1.el8_10.x86_64
Server: Kernel version    4.18.0-553.71.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

+1 on master: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/d4b37a5b-bd2a-4ece-b2ec-1622ac844c17

BTW, this failure happened 20 times in the last 6 months.
